# Maryland Online Data Privacy Act

Jurisdiction: United States - Maryland
Region: US-MD
Citation: Maryland Online Data Privacy Act of 2024
Authority: Maryland General Assembly / Maryland OAG
Source URL: https://mgaleg.maryland.gov/mgawebsite/Legislation/Details/sb0541?ys=2024RS
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, marketing_opt_out, children_data, data_minimization, accountability
Keywords: Maryland Online Data Privacy Act, MODPA, data minimization, sensitive data, consumer rights

## Summary
Maryland comprehensive privacy law effective October 1, 2025, with strong data-minimization, sensitive-data, sale, targeted-advertising, and consumer-rights provisions.

## Key compliance obligations
- Limit collection to reasonably necessary and proportionate personal data.
- Support rights to know, correct, delete, portability, and opt out.
- Apply heightened limits for sensitive data and minors' data.
